input.thought: Open official Meta developer docs and GitHub MCP registry pages to verify auth, access, API surface, and rate-limit details.

arguments.task: Visit the Meta Marketing API documentation page and extract: what the API is for, authentication method details, access prerequisites or app review/business verification requirements, rate limiting notes, and links to any official pages referenced for these topics. Then visit official Meta developer pages for access levels or rate limiting if linked. Return exact source URLs and short supporting quotes.

Visit the official Meta Graph API authentication/security documentation and extract the authentication methods used for API calls, including access tokens or OAuth details, with source URL and short supporting quotes.

Search within the MCP servers repository for any official or community server related to Meta Ads, Facebook Ads, Marketing API, or Meta. Return whether any relevant MCP server exists, with exact repository URLs and snippets.

results_truncated: {"_meta": null, "content": [{"type": "text", "text": "{\"data\":{\"results\":[{\"response\":{\"successful\":true,\"data\":{\"current_goal\":\"\",\"current_step\":4,\"current_url\":\"https://developers.facebook.com/documentation/ads-commerce/marketing-api/overview/rate-limiting\",\"id\":\"06239d48-3488-4a2d-a177-fd926c902093\",\"isSuccess\":true,\"output\":\"The official Meta Marketing API rate limiting page is located at: https://developers.facebook.com/documentation/ads-commerce/marketing-api/overview/rate-limiting\\n\\n**Rate Limit Formula and Enforcement Details:**\\nThe Marketing API uses a scoring system where calls are assigned points: 'Generally speaking, a read API call is equal to 1 point, and a write API call is equal to 3 points, and when you reach the maximum score, we throw a throttling error.'\\n\\n**Enforcement by Access Tier:**\\n- **Development/Limited Tier:** Maximum score of 60, decay rate of 300 seconds, and a block duration of 300 seconds upon reaching the limit.\\n- **Full Access Tier:** Maximum score of 9000, decay rate of 300 seconds, and a block duration of 60 seconds upon reaching the limit.\",\"outputFiles\":[],\"status\":\"finished\",\"steps\":[{\"actions\":[\"{\\\"input\\\": {\\\"index\\\": 42, \\\"text\\\": \\\"rate limiting\\\", \\\"clear\\\": true}}\"],\"duration\":13.86,\"evaluationPreviousGoal\":\"\",\"memory\":\"\",\"nextGoal\":\"\",\"number\":1,\"screenshotUrl\":\"https://cdn.browser-use.com/screenshots/06239d48-3488-4a2d-a177-fd926c902093/...[truncated]

raw_result.description: Meta Ads API enables programmatic management of advertising campaigns and assets across Meta technologies via the Marketing API.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official Meta docs state Graph/Marketing API requests use access tokens, including user, app, page, system user, and client tokens. User tokens are obtained via a login dialog (OAuth-style user authorization). Server-side requests can also use appsecret_proof in addition to the access token, and TLS 1.2/1.3 is required.
raw_result.gating_reason: Meta documents multiple access tiers for the Marketing API (Limited/Development vs Full access), with materially different rate limits. Production-grade use may require higher access, and the gathered evidence indicates app review/access-tier approval flows; exact self-serve boundaries for all endpoints remain somewhat ambiguous from the captured evidence.

api_surface.breadth: Broad marketing/ads management surface built on Meta Graph API endpoints for ad accounts, campaigns, ads, pages, and related assets.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No relevant Meta Ads/Facebook Ads/Marketing API MCP server was confirmed in the official modelcontextprotocol/servers repository evidence gathered. This absence was not exhaustively verified across the entire ecosystem, so treat as no confirmed MCP found.

raw_result.blocker: Public docs and auth are available, but production-strength toolkit use may require Meta access-tier/app-review approval and potentially business/system-user setup for some workflows.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Official Marketing API rate limiting docs describe a point-based throttle: read calls are generally 1 point and write calls 3 points. Captured evidence reports Development/Limited tier max score 60 with 300-second decay and 300-second block duration, versus Full Access max score 9000 with 300-second decay and 60-second block duration.
raw_result.notable_signals: Marketing API is a dedicated ads surface on top of Graph API; auth docs are detailed; access token types include system user tokens useful for automation; security docs recommend appsecret_proof and require TLS 1.2/1.3; access-tier differences strongly affect usable throughput.
raw_result.human_review_reason: The evidence supports token/OAuth auth, REST surface, and rate limits, but the exact classification of access gating (self-serve vs approval-required) and whether app review/business verification are mandatory for a first usable toolkit across common Meta Ads actions was not fully resolved from the captured pages. MCP nonexistence is also only unconfirmed, not exhaustively disproven.
